variable.name: GA4 Measurement ID
variable.notes: GA4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXX). Edit this Constant variable in GTM admin to point at your GA4 stream.

trigger.name: All Pages — sGTM
trigger.notes: Fires on every event the sGTM container receives — used by the GA4 forwarder tag.

tag.name: GA4 — Forward to Google
tag.notes: Forwards every event the sGTM receives onward to GA4. Add Meta CAPI / TikTok Events / Snap CAPI tags from GTM admin → New Tag → Custom Templates if you want them.

client.name: GA4 Client
client.notes: Default sGTM client — receives /g/collect requests forwarded from the web container.

_meta.purpose: Minimal viable sGTM config for client+server flow. Provides: (1) GA4 Client to receive /g/collect from the web container, (2) GA4 tag to relay onward to Google, (3) All-events trigger.
_meta.extensions: Meta CAPI, TikTok Events API, and Snap Conversions API are best added via GTM admin → Tag Manager Gallery community templates after deploy. The server container will accept new tags without re-deploy as long as the user re-publishes.
